rows.description: Recepta varia
rows.notes: Consensus across extractors for this clear header.

rows.description: 1788 Novr. 4th Mr. William Harriott's Plate money
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. Selected `gpt-5-mini`'s description as '4th' is clearly visible and the name is 'Harriott's' upon visual verification, not 'Seiriett's' as in `claude-haiku`.

rows.description: Mr. Bowden's do.
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. Selected `gpt-5-mini`'s description as 'Bowden's' is a more accurate reading of the script upon visual verification.

rows.description: Dec. 6. of the Revd Mr. Cooke Dr. Hartridge's Benefaction
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. Selected `gpt-5-mini`'s description due to superior reading of the abbreviated and slightly complex phrase 'Dr. Hartridge's Benefaction' upon visual verification.

rows.description: 31 Increment due at Midst last from the Bursar
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus and clearly visible, including the 0.5 fraction (an 'ob' mark after the '2'). `gpt-5-mini`'s description is more accurate, particularly 'Bursar', compared to `claude-haiku`'s 'Parrott'.

rows.description: 1789 Jan. 31. of Mr. Bowles Esq. R/up Rent for A. Witchenham
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. `gpt-5-mini`'s description is much more accurate upon visual verification, specifically the name 'Bowles' and 'Witchenham', compared to `claude-haiku`'s 'Oersley' and 'Ketcham'.

rows.description: Feb. 24. Geo. King & Mr. John King's Plate money
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. `gpt-5-mini`'s description is a much more accurate reading of the names and 'Plate money' phrase upon visual verification, compared to `claude-haiku`'s 'Mrs. Ben Cogging's Attorney'.

rows.description: Mar. 27. Mr. John Harriott's Plate money
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. `gpt-5-mini`'s description is more accurate, particularly the name 'Harriott's' which matches a prior entry, unlike `claude-haiku`'s 'Lourdes's'.

rows.description: June 3. of Mr. Cooke Dr. St. Benefac. 2d Payment
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. `gpt-5-mini`'s description is a much more accurate reading of the names and abbreviations 'Mr. Cooke' and 'Benefac.' upon visual verification, compared to `claude-haiku`'s 'Mr. Clarke, St. H. Bougles'.

rows.description: 11. of Mr. Parsons 4 years of pews & exhibn which Wm. O'Neill
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. `gpt-5-mini`'s description is a more accurate reading of the names 'Mr. Parsons' and 'Wm. O'Neill', and the phrase '4 years of pews & exhibn', upon visual verification.

rows.description: of Mr. Bowles 2d Payment for A. Witchenham
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. `gpt-5-mini`'s description ('Bowles' and 'A. Witchenham') is more accurate and consistent with the earlier entry from the same person/place (Row 6).

rows.description: 29. of Mr. Demainbray Devis fees to House
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. `gpt-5-mini`'s description, specifically 'Devis fees to House', is a more accurate interpretation of the handwriting than `claude-haiku`'s 'Senr. to be Recd.'.

rows.description: July 1. of Mr. Vivian Parson. increm. to Midst. 1789
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms pence amount is '5' with a half-penny fraction (0.5), matching `gpt-5-mini`'s amount. `gpt-5-mini`'s description ('Parson. increm. to Midst. 1789') is also more accurate than `claude-haiku`'s 'Corrs. Herein. & this'd 1789'.

rows.description: A Quarter Part of Mr. Donaldson's Time for the share
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. `gpt-5-mini`'s description is much more accurate upon visual verification, especially the name 'Donaldson's' and the phrase 'Time for the share', compared to `claude-haiku`'s 'Mr. Smithcrafte's Rent forfeited sale'.

rows.description: Mr. Samonds? Annu. increm. for year 1788
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms pence amount is '3' with a half-penny fraction (0.5), matching `gpt-5-mini`'s amount. The name is ambiguous; 'Samonds' is a blend of plausible readings. `gpt-5-mini`'s phrase 'Annu. increm. for year 1788' is a better interpretation of the script.

rows.description: oct. 30. of Gibbons, Farmer, for old Iron as by Act.
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. `gpt-5-mini`'s description is much more accurate upon visual verification, particularly 'Gibbons, Farmer' and 'as by Act', compared to `claude-haiku`'s 'G. Alane, Jameer, for old Iron & Heat'.

rows.description: Mr Robt. Hartin Acct. for Merton Estate from Mid. 1787 & Mid. 1788
rows.notes: Consensus on type and empty amounts. `gpt-5-mini`'s description is a much more accurate reading of the header, especially names and key terms ('Hartin', 'Merton Estate'), upon visual verification.

rows.description: money Rent - 265.0.0.
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms the pounds amount is '265', matching `gpt-5-mini`. `gpt-5-mini`'s description also includes the full amount as written on the line.

rows.description: Low Rent - 05.12.0.
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. Visual verification indicates the description is 'Low Rent - 05.12.0.'. `gpt-5-mini` considered 'Low Rent' as an alternative, which is the most accurate reading from the image.

rows.description: Total of years Rent 270.12.0.
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. `gpt-5-mini`'s description 'Total of years Rent' is much more accurate upon visual verification. The amounts also correctly sum the preceding two entries (265+5).

rows.description: Deductions allowed
rows.notes: Consensus across extractors for this clear header.

rows.description: Land Tax - 34-7-0
rows.notes: Consensus across extractors for this clear entry.

rows.description: Leverett Close - 6-10-10
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. Visual verification confirms the description is 'Leverett Close', correcting both extractors' interpretations ('Leavitth'/'Levescitt').

rows.description: Rep. of Vic. House - 7-6-7
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. `gpt-5-mini`'s description ('Rep. of Vic. House') is a much more accurate reading upon visual verification compared to `claude-haiku`'s 'Rep. of Me. Borye'.

rows.description: Dr. of Chancel - 0-8-9
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. `gpt-5-mini`'s description ('Dr. of Chancel') is a much more accurate reading upon visual verification compared to `claude-haiku`'s 'Dd. of Porrcarl'.

rows.description: Total of Deductions 48-12-4
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus. `gpt-5-mini`'s description accurately reflects the distinct line for 'Total of Deductions' as shown in the image. `claude-haiku` incorrectly merged this line with the subsequent balance statement, leading to a structural error.

rows.description: Remains clear for the Year's Rent 221 19 8
rows.notes: `gpt-5-mini` correctly identified this as a distinct row. `claude-haiku` incorrectly merged part of this description into the previous row and completely missed the associated amount. Visual verification confirms this row and its amount are clearly present and separate.

Amounts are consensus and clearly visible. The description for this grand total is simply the figures themselves, as captured by `gpt-5-mini`, including the 0.5 fraction (a 'd'-like loop after the 7). `claude-haiku` provided a generic placeholder description.
